title: Kuenssberg, David -Director General, Corporate and Delivery, Home Office -ACOBA advice
body: "Mr Kuenssberg left his role at the Home Office in July 2025.  Chief Finance Officer, London Borough of Redbridge  Mr Kuenssberg sought the Committee’s advice about taking up a role with the London Borough of Redbridge. The letter containing the Committee’s consideration and the conditions imposed on the appointment was sent in June 2025 and the appointment was taken up in July 2025. An accessible version of the letter is available "
